summary: Frontend-only verification of Fork·Fate PayPal sponsor subscription flow. All three flows passed: (1) Subscribe redirects to sandbox.paypal.com/webapps/billing/subscriptions, (2) /sponsor/success with fake sub id polls and lands on 'Almost there' pending state with working home link, (3) /sponsor/cancelled renders 'Checkout cancelled' card.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sponsor subscribe → PayPal sandbox redirect confirmed (final URL: https://www.sandbox.paypal.com/webapps/billing/subscriptions?ba_token=...). Status page polling (~15s) transitions from 'Confirming your subscription…' to 'Almost there' for non-existent subscription id, as expected. Cancelled page renders correctly.
